title: HTML Input Types
content:
### HTML Input Types

The `type` attribute of `<input>` defines what kind of data to collect.

---

### Text Input Types

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `text` | Default -- single line text |
| `password` | Masked input |
| `email` | Email address (validates @) |
| `tel` | Phone number |
| `url` | Web address (validates URL) |
| `search` | Search field |

```html
<input type="text" placeholder="Name">
<input type="password" placeholder="Password">
<input type="email" placeholder="Email">
```

---

### Number Input Types

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `number` | Numbers only (with spinner) |
| `range` | Slider control |

```html
<input type="number" min="1" max="10" step="0.5">
<input type="range" min="0" max="100" value="50">
```

---

### Date/Time Input Types

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `date` | Date picker (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| `time` | Time picker |
| `datetime-local` | Date + time (no timezone) |
| `month` | Month and year |
| `week` | Week and year |

```html
<input type="date">
<input type="time">
<input type="datetime-local">
```

---

### Selection Input Types

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `checkbox` | Multiple choices |
| `radio` | Single choice |
| `file` | File upload |
| `color` | Color picker |

```html
<input type="checkbox" name="hobby" value="coding">
<input type="radio" name="gender" value="male">
<input type="file">
<input type="color">
```

---

### Button Input Types

| Type | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `submit` | Submit form |
| `reset` | Reset all fields |
| `button` | Generic button |
| `image` | Image as submit button |

```html
<input type="submit" value="Send">
<input type="reset" value="Clear">
<input type="button" value="Click">
<input type="image" src="submit.png" alt="Submit">
```

> **Modern Browsers:** Most input types come with built-in validation and mobile-friendly keyboards.

quiz.question: Which input type shows a color picker?
